brand.name: Heita
brand.tagline: Ukunyaniseka, ukuthumela imiyalezo, kunye neendawo zomsebenzi ze-AI kwinkqubo enye eqala ngomnxeba.

landing.intro: I-Heita inika abathengisi nezishishini ezincinci umgca ngqo kubathengi babo — nge-WhatsApp, i-QR, kunye nohlelo olukhawulezayo olufakwayo olusebenza kwizicwangciso zedatha abantu boMzantsi Afrika abazisebenzisa ngokwenene.

features.joinDescription: Iikhowudi ze-QR evenkileni, kwiirisithi, kumathegi eemveliso, kumyalezo we-WhatsApp, okanye ikhonkco elithe ngqo — yonke imingeniso ihlala kwiphrofayile enye yeshishini.
features.messagingDescription: I-SMS, i-WhatsApp, i-push, kunye nezaziso ezisohlelweni ziya kunye kumgca omnye wexesha ngokwekhasimende, olawulwa liqela lakho.
features.aiDescription: Ivenkile nganye iqeqesha i-AI eyaziyo amaxwebhu kwikhathalogu yayo, imibuzo eqhelekileyo, nemigaqo-nkqubo. I-Ollama ngokwesiqhelo, ifuya yamafu xa uyifuna.
features.loyaltyDescription: Amanqanaba, imivuzo, izikhuthazi, iimali zokubhalisa, nezikhumbuzi zeziganeko, konke kudibene kwi-wallet enye onokuyithwala kuyo nayiphi na indawo.
features.pwaDescription: Iyafakeka, iyaqonda ngokungeyontethelo, kwaye ikhawuleza kwizicwangciso zedatha abantu boMzantsi Afrika abazisebenzisayo. Akukho ukugcinwa kwivenkile ye-app.
features.trustDescription: Iiwebhuki ze-WhatsApp eziqinisekisiweyo, ii-OTP ezilinganiselweyo, i-CSP ivaliwe, abaqeshi bahlukene ngokomgaqo-nkqubo we-row-level.

auth.signInBlurb: Sikhipha kuphela iikhowudi zokungena kwiinombolo zomnxeba eziqinisekisiweyo. Abathengi abatsha kufuneka baqale benze i-akhawunti.
auth.signUpBlurb: Siqinisekisa inombolo yakho yomnxeba ngaphambi kokwenza i-akhawunti ukuze ii-SIM eziphindwe zithathiwe zingakwazi ukuthatha isazisi ngokufihlakeleyo.
auth.providerSuffix: I-Google ne-Apple sign-in zivela ngokuzenzekelayo xa zicwangcisiwe.
auth.footerSecurity: Inomlinganiselo · isayinwe nge-HMAC · ipheleliswa kwimizuzu eli-10

home.summarySingle: Ulilungu leshishini elinye, unamanqaku ali-{points} kwi-wallet yakho.
home.summaryPlural: Ulilungu kumashishini angu-{count}, unamanqaku ali-{points} kwi-wallet yakho.
home.discoveryMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 ziphumo} one {1 isiphumo} other {# iziphumo}}
home.emptyBody: Skena ikhowudi ye-QR evenkileni ebandakanya, vula ikhonkco lokujoyina le-WhatsApp, okanye thepha iqhosha lokujoyina kwiphrofayile yeshishini ukuze uqalise ukufumana amanqaku.
